name: File Modification
description: Changes made to a file, including updates to its contents, metadata, access permissions, or attributes. These modifications may indicate legitimate activity (e.g., software updates) or unauthorized changes (e.g., tampering, ransomware, or adversarial modifications).

modification_types.description: Changes to the content of a configuration file.
Altering file permissions to allow broader access.
Adjusting a file's creation or modification timestamp.

audit_framework.description: Monitor file modifications (writes and attribute changes).

inotify.description: Watch for real-time changes to files or directories.

siem_integration.action: Collect logs from endpoint agents and file servers to centralize file modification event data.

log_sources.Name: auditd:FILE
log_sources.Channel: Modification of Display Manager configuration files (/etc/gdm3/*, /etc/lightdm/*)

log_sources.Name: auditd:PATH
log_sources.Channel: write: Modification of /boot/grub/*, /boot/efi/EFI/*, or initramfs images

log_sources.Name: auditd:PATH
log_sources.Channel: write or create events on *.pth, sitecustomize.py, usercustomize.py in site-packages or dist-packages

log_sources.Name: auditd:PATH
log_sources.Channel: write: File modifications to /etc/systemd/sleep.conf or related power configuration files

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: execve call for modification of /etc/sudoers or writing to /var/db/sudo

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel:
open, write: File modifications under /etc/ssl/certs, /usr/local/share/ca-certificates, or

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: open, unlink, rename: Suspicious file access, deletion, or modification of sensitive paths

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: write: Modification of structured stored data by suspicious processes

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel:
Modification of user

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL

log_sources.Channel: modification of entrypoint scripts or init containers

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL

log_sources.Channel:
file system events

                kFSEventStreamEventFlagItemXattrMod flags
